Imad Rida, PhD

Journal: ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, Communications, and Applications (IF: 6, Q1)

Special Issue: Towards Responsible and Explainable Multi-Modal Fusion

Official CFP PDF: ACM TOMM call for papers PDF

Submissions deadline: August 31, 2026

First-round review decisions: October 31, 2026

Deadline for revision submissions: December 15, 2026

Notification of final decisions: February 15, 2027

Tentative publication: April 2027

Guest editors:

  • Lucia Cascone, University of Salerno, Italy
  • Emanuela Marasco, Virginia Commonwealth University, USA
  • Imad Rida, Université de Technologie de Compiègne, France

Topics include:

  • Responsible and explainable multimodal-fusion architectures
  • Evaluation protocols for multimodal fusion
  • Foundation-model and multimodal-LLM alignment
  • Interpretable decision-making
  • Generative and synthetic data
  • Bias detection and mitigation
  • Fairness and accountability
  • Transfer learning
  • Domain adaptation
  • Adversarial robustness
  • Cross-modal security
  • Continual and lifelong learning
  • Federated multimodal learning
  • Edge multimodal learning
  • Privacy-preserving multimodal learning

#ACMTOMM #SpecialIssue #ResponsibleAI #ExplainableAI #MultimodalFusion
